name: Cream of Cauliflower Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cauliflower, cooked and coarsely mashed
salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced onion and minced celery. Sauté for about 4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the onions are translucent.
3. Stir in the chicken broth and add the cooked, coarsely mashed cauliflower. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat to low and stir in the light cream. Simmer gently until heated through but not boiling.
5. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
6. Remove from heat and stir in chopped fresh parsley and nutmeg.
